title: quercus airensis
intro: Quercus airensis, also known as the Coast Live Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the coastal regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus airensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
